de.uka.ilkd.key.nparser

Interface KeYParserListener

  • All Superinterfaces:
    org.antlr.v4.runtime.tree.ParseTreeListener
    All Known Implementing Classes:
    KeYParserBaseListener

    public interface KeYParserListener
extends org.antlr.v4.runtime.tree.ParseTreeListener
    This interface defines a complete listener for a parse tree produced by KeYParser.
